hero_desc: Digital transformation specialist — I design custom tools and growth strategies for local businesses and beyond.
service_1_desc: Building custom management tools (ERP, invoicing, inventory) with Python and Google Apps Script to eliminate manual tasks.
service_2_desc: Online presence audit, local SEO optimization, brand content and growth strategy tailored to your market.
service_3_desc: Designing clear and functional interfaces with Figma. Creating showcase websites and e-commerce stores focused on user experience.
cta_desc: Whether it's automating your processes, boosting your visibility or building your website, let's talk.
about_desc_1: Bachelor's student in Digital Marketing & Social Media at Collège de Paris Supérieur (Togo), I specialize in digital transformation — from building custom management tools to implementing growth strategies.
about_desc_2: Used to working autonomously on concrete projects, I combine technical rigor and marketing vision to digitize and optimize business processes. Analytical, curious, and constantly improving.
exp_1_org: The Young Tiger — Independent project, Lomé
exp_1_desc: Full 360° digitization: visual identity, communication materials, Google Maps local SEO, IT infrastructure setup and configuration.
exp_2_desc: Cleaning and structuring a 1,900+ row database to optimize member data exploitation.
exp_3_desc: Administrative organization and tracking of credit files. Observation and analysis of internal processes.
edu_1_title: Bachelor in Digital Marketing & Social Media
edu_1_desc: Digital strategy, community management, SEO, brand content, corporate communication, project management.
edu_2_org: Lycée Privée Laique La Source, Lomé
projects_desc: Concrete projects, delivered to real clients and organizations.
proj_erp_desc: Native Python inventory management app + automated invoicing system on Google Sheets for complete sales cycle digitization.
proj_tiger_desc: Full digitization mission: visual identity, communication materials, local SEO and IT infrastructure.
proj_ecom_desc: Multi-category e-commerce store deployed on Netlify — American tech products, multi-page navigation and responsive interface in pure HTML/CSS/JS.
proj_data_desc: Collection, cleaning and structuring of the first national digital database of ASSAFETO members — from 1,900+ raw entries to 1,400+ validated members, segmented by region.
proj_otaku_desc: Anime streaming platform with full catalogue, weekly schedule, categories and personalized recommendation system — designed and deployed on Wix.
